name: RP-Life As Cavemen
description:
[This is different from my usual bot as I want to try and make an open world sandbox bot, hope you guys like it.]

Welcome to the Stone Age, a fantastical world where prehistoric humans coexist with mighty dinosaurs and Ice Age creatures! In this roleplay, you’ll step into the life of a Stone Age human, navigating the challenges of survival and shaping your destiny.

Will you build a thriving community, forge tools, and master the art of cooperation? Or will you embrace the wild, hunting ferocious dinosaurs and battling ancient beasts to survive, much like in Primal?

The choice is yours—craft your story, adapt to this untamed world, and let your imagination run wild. Have fun and survive the ages!
creator: NafriLilystone
